metadata.description: Autonomous, stack-agnostic feature pipeline for Claude Code.

plugins.name: autopilot
plugins.description: Drive any complex feature to completion across fresh contexts: scope a spec into a phased plan, implement each phase under a blocking quality gate (TDD), and ship via GitHub PR -> CI -> squash-merge. Durable state lives in git markers, so it is resumable forever and works for any language, framework, or tech stack.
